SELECT
    SUM(l.amount) - SUM(l.payments) AS debt_amount,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(l.amount) - SUM(l.payments) = 0 THEN 'No debt'
        WHEN SUM(l.amount) - SUM(l.payments) > 0 AND l.status = 'A' THEN 'Active loan with debt'
        WHEN SUM(l.amount) - SUM(l.payments) > 0 AND l.status = 'B' THEN 'Loan with debt (status B)'
        ELSE 'Unknown status'
    END AS payment_status
FROM
    loan l
JOIN
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 END)
        THEN 'More in-patient'
        ELSE 'More outpatient'
    END AS Comparison,
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 /
         NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 END), 0)) - 100, 2
    ) AS Percentage_Deviation
FROM Patient;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

SELECT
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) AS SME_LAM_Diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'LAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) AS LAM_KAM_Diff,

    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'KAM' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) -
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
     JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
     WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
     AND Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth
                        JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
                        WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND customers.Currency = 'CZK' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312')) AS KAM_SME_Diff;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionIncrease,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' AND c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM
    yearmonth ym
JOIN
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    PercentageIncrease DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM (
    SELECT t.CustomerID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'euro'
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
) AS customer_totals;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT (y12.Consumption - y13.Consumption) / y12.Consumption AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearmonth y12
JOIN yearmonth y13 ON y12.CustomerID = y13.CustomerID
JOIN transactions_1k t ON y12.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
WHERE y12.Date LIKE '2012-%' AND y13.Date LIKE '2013-%'
AND t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Amount * t.Price = 634.8
GROUP BY y12.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
